name: Kiwifruit Daiquiri
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend all ingredients except kiwifruit slices in a blender until smooth.
2. Pour the mixture into stemmed glasses.
3. Garnish the edge of each glass with a kiwifruit slice.
4. Serve and enjoy. Makes 2 servings.
Nutritional analysis per serving: 82.6 calories; 0.2 grams total fat; (0.1 grams saturated fat); 0.5 grams protein; 7.2 grams carbohydrates; 0 milligrams cholesterol; 2.7 milligrams sodium.
